title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at Apollo Pharmacy

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at Apollo Pharmacy
jsonLd.description:
Apollo Pharmacy is actively seeking a talented and motivated Visual Merchandiser to join our dynamic team in Mysuru. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Apollo Pharmacy:
Apollo Pharmacy is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Planogram

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Apollo Pharmacy!
